arts.ttl: Valladolid vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s visit to Valladolid should be a manageable one, given that Pucela are sitting last in the table and fighting to avoid relegation. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Fran Garcia, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid claims around Aston Villa player show things are getting a little silly
arts.sum: Real Madrid have joined Paris Saint-Germain and Al-Nassr in the chase for Aston Villa star Jhon Durán. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who have been covering the striker over the past week or so. They state Real Madrid are ‘hot’ for the Aston Villa player, who is on the agenda of PSG and Al-Nassr. arts.ttl: Decisions, decisions: Ancelotti’s Real Madrid choices for latest LaLiga test
arts.sum: Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Asencio, Rüdiger, Fran García; Ceballos or Tchouaméni, Valverde; Brahim, Bellingham, Rodrygo; Mbappé. The likely defensive lineup will feature Lucas Vázquez, Raúl Asencio - who is becoming more dependable in central defense and drawing comparisons to Nacho - Rüdiger, and Fran García, who is expected to replace Ferland Mendy after the latter started in the Champions League.
